turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi there! I'm calling to ask about your office hours this week and if you're open on Saturday.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Could you please provide your first and last name to create a demo patient profile?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: This will let me share more details about our office hours.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: and your date of birth is July 4th.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Pivot Point Orthopedics is open Monday through Friday.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Our hours are 9 a.m. to 4 p.m. on Monday, Tuesday, and Thursday.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Thanks for that. And what about

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Oh, I see. Thanks for letting me know.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: No, that covers it. Thanks for your help. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?
